---
title: "About"
---

## Bio

Under construction.

## Education

- **Ph.D. in Mathematics**, Stony Brook University, 2025-2029 (Expected)
- **M.A. in Mathematics**, University of Nebraska-Omaha, 2024-2025
- **B.S. in Mathematics**, University of Nebraska-Omaha, 2020-2023

## Research Interests

Broadly speaking, I am interested in the applications of mathematical analysis,
topology, and geometry in quantitative finance. Some specific topics of interest
are:

- Information geometry
- $H^\infty$ optimization
- Numerical methods for free-boundary partial differential equations

## Contact

Email: jacob.white@stonybrook.edu
